chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl.Misc.Appln.No.S-25 of 2021. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For orders on M.A.No.411/2021 (E/A). 03. For hearing of main case. 15.11.2021 Mr. Ali Nawaz Ghanghro, Advocate for the applicant. = * = * = * = * = * = It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the learned 5th Additional Sessions Judge, Shikarpur, is pressing hard upon applicant/complainant Ghulam Akbar and his daughter PW/Victim Mst.Maryam to have compromise with the accused, otherwise, they to be prepared for dire consequents. By contending so, he sought for transfer of case of the applicant/complainant from the Court of learned 5th Additional Sessions Judge, Shikarpur, to any other court of competent jurisdiction. Heard and perused the record. It is not made known by the applicant/ complainant that on which date and in what fashion, he and his daughter were threatened by learned trial Judge to have compromise with the accused. The ground advanced by the applicant/complainant for transfer of his case from the Court of learned 5th Additional Sessions Judge, Shikarpur is appearing to be false and self invented, which is not justifying transfer of criminal case from one to other Court. Consequently, the instant criminal transfer application being misconceived is dismissed in limine. J U D G E
